## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. -->

- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes with 0 errors
- [ ] `flutter test` passes (all tests)
- [ ] Manual testing on Android device (describe device + Android version)
- [ ] Tested with Jellyfin backend
- [ ] Tested with Navidrome backend

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (design tokens, naming conventions)
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed (ARCHITECTURE.md, code comments)
- [ ] No hardcoded colors, spacing, or typography (using `AfColors`, `AfSpacing`, `AfTypography`)
- [ ] No `print()` calls (using `afLog()` for logging)
- [ ] Stream subscriptions and timers are properly cancelled in `dispose()`
